name: DeltaMerge
description: Insert, delete and update data using the Delta merge command.

fields.name: sourceAlias
fields.title: Source Alias
fields.description: Alias to use for the source DataFrame

fields.name: targetAlias
fields.title: Target Alias
fields.description: Alias to use for existing target Delta table

fields.name: mergeCondition
fields.title: Merge Condition
fields.description: Condition to merge data from source DataFrame to target table, which would be used to perform update, delete, or insert actions as specified.

fields.name: whenMatchedUpdateAction
fields.title: WhenMatched Update Action
fields.description: Update the row from Source that already exists in Target based on Merge Condition.

fields.name: whenMatchedUpdateCondition
fields.title: Merge Condition
fields.description: Optional additional condition for updating row. If specified then it must evaluate to true for the row to be updated.

fields.name: whenMatchedDeleteAction
fields.title: WhenMatched Delete Action
fields.description: Delete rows if Merge Condition and the optional additional condition evaluates to true.

fields.name: whenMatchedDeleteCondition
fields.title: WhenMatched Delete Condition
fields.description: Optional additional condition for deleting row. If a condition is specified then it must evaluate to true for the row to be deleted.

fields.name: whenNotMatchedAction
fields.title: WhenNot Matched Action
fields.description: The action to perform if the row from Source is not present in Target based on Merge Condition

fields.name: whenNotMatchedCondition
fields.title: WhenNot Matched Condition
fields.description: Optional condition for inserting row. If a condition is specified then it must evaluate to true for the row to be updated.
